member.summary: Evidence is current and within the required freshness window.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.AuditEvidenceFreshness.NearingExpiry
member.summary: Evidence is approaching its expiry window (within 7 days).

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.AuditEvidenceFreshness.Stale
member.summary: Evidence has exceeded its validity window and is stale.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.AuditEvidenceFreshness.Missing
member.summary: Evidence is absent; could not be located for this subject.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.AuditEvidenceFreshness.Invalid
member.summary: Evidence exists but failed validation checks.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.AuditEvidenceFreshness.ProviderUnavailable
member.summary: Source system was unreachable at export assembly time.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.ComplianceAuditExportPackage
member.summary:
Canonical compliance audit export package: a durable, scenario-specific evidence bundle assembled from compliance, KYC/AML, sign-off, and approval-history sources.
Each package is:
Identified by a stable (UUID) for re-identification and comparison.
Scenario-classified so downstream clients can route by use case.
Audience-aware so framing matches the target reviewer.
Fail-closed: missing, stale, or unverified evidence downgrades explicitly.
Integrity-protected by a (SHA-256).
Traceable via for append-only comparison over time.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.ComplianceAuditExportPackage.ExportId
member.summary: Stable export package identifier (UUID).

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.ComplianceAuditExportPackage.SubjectId
member.summary: Subject or issuer identifier for whom this package was assembled.

member.summary: Scenario type that drove evidence assembly.

member.summary: Audience profile applied during assembly.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.ComplianceAuditExportPackage.Readiness
member.summary: Readiness determination for this package (fail-closed).

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.ComplianceAuditExportPackage.ReadinessHeadline
member.summary: Single-sentence headline explaining the readiness determination.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceAuditExport.ComplianceAuditExportPackage.ReadinessDetail
member.summary: Detailed, paragraph-level explanation of the readiness determination.

member.summary: UTC timestamp when this package was assembled.

member.summary: UTC timestamp when this package expires or should be regenerated. Null indicates no expiry.

member.summary: Environment label (e.g., "production", "staging") captured at assembly time.

member.summary: Head reference or version alignment string (e.g., git commit SHA, release tag) captured at assembly time.

member.summary: Schema version of this package format for contract stability.

member.summary: All blocker items (open and resolved) detected during package assembly. Clients must never suppress or hide blocker items when presenting export status.

member.summary: Number of open critical blockers. Non-zero → package is not regulator-ready.

member.summary: Whether this package is suitable for regulator-grade submission. True only when is .

member.summary: Optional notes about the SLA rationale.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilityStatus
member.summary: Case-level evidence availability status, designed for frontend cockpit consumption. Expresses the overall completeness of evidence across the entire case rather than per-item status. Enables the UI to show "Evidence is complete", "Evidence is partial", "Evidence is stale", or "Evidence is unavailable" without inferring state from low-level flags.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilityStatus.Complete
member.summary: All required evidence is present, valid, and within its validity period. The case is evidence-complete and can proceed to review.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilityStatus.Partial
member.summary: Some required evidence is present but one or more items are missing or pending. The case cannot proceed to full review until the gaps are resolved.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilityStatus.Stale
member.summary: Evidence was previously present but has passed its expiry date. The evidence bundle must be refreshed before the case can proceed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilityStatus.Unavailable
member.summary: Required evidence cannot be obtained due to a provider failure, configuration error, or explicit block. Manual intervention may be required.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary
member.summary: Case-level evidence availability summary, computed from the individual evidence items on a case. Provides operator-friendly semantics (Complete/Partial/Stale/Unavailable), item counts, and a remediation hint suitable for the operations cockpit.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.CaseId
member.summary: Case identifier this summary belongs to.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.Status
member.summary: Overall evidence availability status for the case.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.TotalEvidenceItems
member.summary: Total number of evidence items attached to the case.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.ValidItems
member.summary: Number of evidence items in a valid, non-expired state.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.StaleItems
member.summary: Number of evidence items that are in a stale (expired) state.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.PendingItems
member.summary: Number of evidence items currently in a pending state (awaiting capture).

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.RejectedItems
member.summary: Number of evidence items explicitly rejected.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.MissingItems
member.summary: Number of evidence types required but not yet attached.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.IsBundleExpired
member.summary: True when the overall evidence bundle has passed its case-level expiry date.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.BundleExpiresAt
member.summary: When the case-level evidence bundle expires (null if no bundle expiry is set).

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.StaleEvidenceTypes
member.summary: Evidence types that are stale and require refresh.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.ValidEvidenceTypes
member.summary: Evidence types that are present and valid.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.PendingOrMissingTypes
member.summary: Evidence types that are pending or missing.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.OperatorSummary
member.summary: Operator-facing explanation of the current evidence availability status. Suitable for direct display in the operations cockpit.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.RemediationHint
member.summary: Remediation hint describing the specific action required to move evidence to Complete status. Null when evidence is already Complete.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseEvidenceAvailabilitySummary.EvaluatedAt
member.summary: When this availability summary was computed.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceCaseManagement.CaseOrchestrationView
member.summary: Comprehensive operational view of a compliance case, designed as the single authoritative snapshot the frontend cockpit needs to render role-aware operator journeys. Combines lifecycle state, evidence availability, blockers, SLA status, handoff status, available transitions, and next-action guidance into one response.

member.summary: Priority level for this case.

member.summary: True when this case is in a terminal state (Approved or Rejected).

member.summary: Structured blockers currently preventing the case from proceeding.

member.summary: True when there are no fail-closed blockers (case can proceed).

member.summary: SLA metadata for this case (null when no SLA has been set).

member.summary: Available state transitions from the current state, with availability flags and labels. Provides the frontend with the exact set of actions the operator can take.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ComplianceCheckResponse.IssuancePosture
member.summary: Derived issuance posture — indicates whether token launch or approval progression is blocked by this compliance decision, and provides a machine-readable reason distinguishing launch-blocking failures from advisory follow-up items. Always populated when is true.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockSeverity
member.summary: Severity of a compliance blocker with respect to token issuance.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockSeverity.None
member.summary: No blockers; token launch may proceed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockSeverity.Advisory
member.summary: Advisory status — the compliance state warrants attention but does not hard-block launch (e.g. provider temporarily unavailable, non-critical metadata refresh needed).

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockSeverity.Blocking
member.summary: Launch must not proceed. A confirmed or unresolved high-risk outcome is present. This is a hard stop — fail-closed.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason
member.summary: Machine-readable reason explaining why token issuance is blocked or flagged.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.None
member.summary: No blocker; all compliance checks are satisfied.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.ConfirmedSanctionsMatch
member.summary: A confirmed AML/sanctions match was found. Hard block — fail closed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.PotentialSanctionsMatchUnresolved
member.summary: A potential sanctions match is pending manual resolution. Hard block until resolved.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.KycRejected
member.summary: KYC was explicitly rejected by the provider or a reviewer. Hard block.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.KycOrAmlExpired
member.summary: A previously-approved KYC/AML decision has expired and must be renewed before launch.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.KycOrAmlPending
member.summary: The KYC/AML check has been initiated but no decision has been reached yet.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.KycInsufficientData
member.summary: Insufficient subject data was provided to complete the compliance check.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.KycManualReviewRequired
member.summary: The decision requires manual review before it can be used to gate launch.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.ProviderUnavailable
member.summary: The compliance provider was unavailable; the check result is indeterminate. Advisory — retry recommended.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuanceBlockerReason.ComplianceCheckError
member.summary: An internal error occurred during the compliance check. The decision is indeterminate. Advisory — retry recommended.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuancePosture
member.summary: Describes whether token launch or approval progression is blocked by a compliance decision, and provides human-meaningful context about the blocker for frontend and audit consumers.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.IssuancePosture.IsLaunchBlocked
member.summary: True when this compliance decision hard-blocks token launch or approval progression. False for advisory statuses where launch could proceed under policy, but the status warrants attention.

member.summary: Severity of the compliance posture with respect to issuance.

member.summary: Machine-readable reason for the blocker (or advisory status).

member.summary: Human-readable description of the blocker for display in compliance dashboards.

member.summary: Optional override for the check type. When omitted, the same check type as the original decision is used.

member.summary: Inbound provider webhook/callback payload for updating a compliance decision. The orchestration layer accepts normalised callbacks from any registered provider and maps them to the decision identified by .

member.summary: Name of the provider sending the callback (e.g. "StripeIdentity", "ComplyAdvantage", "Mock"). Used to select the correct signature-validation logic.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackRequest.ProviderReferenceId
member.summary: The provider-issued reference ID that links this callback to a compliance decision. Must match the KycProviderReferenceId or AmlProviderReferenceId stored on the decision.

member.summary: Provider-specific event type string (e.g. "verification.session.verified", "alert.created"). Used to determine the resulting compliance state.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackRequest.OutcomeStatus
member.summary: Normalised outcome from the provider: "approved", "rejected", "needs_review", "error", or "pending". The orchestration layer maps this to .

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackRequest.ReasonCode
member.summary: Optional reason code accompanying the outcome.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackRequest.Message
member.summary: Optional free-text message from the provider about the outcome.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackRequest.Signature
member.summary: Optional HMAC-SHA256 signature for request authenticity validation. Pass the raw signature string (hex or base64) as provided by the provider.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackRequest.IdempotencyKey
member.summary: Optional idempotency key for the callback event. When the same key is seen twice, the second call is accepted without re-processing.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackResponse
member.summary: Response from processing a provider webhook/callback.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackResponse.Success
member.summary: Whether the callback was successfully processed

member.summary: Decision ID that was updated (populated on success)

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackResponse.NewState
member.summary: New state of the decision after the callback was applied

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ComplianceOrchestration.ProviderCallbackResponse.IsIdempotentReplay
member.summary: True when the callback was valid but had already been processed (idempotent replay). The decision is unchanged.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DecisionIntelligence.NormalizationMethod.ZScore
member.summary: Z-score normalization (standardization)
member.remarks: Converts values to standard deviations from mean: (value - mean) / stddev Best for normally distributed data

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DecisionIntelligence.NormalizationMethod.MinMax
member.summary: Min-max normalization (scales to 0-100 range)
member.remarks: Scales values to 0-100: (value - min) / (max - min) * 100 Best for comparing relative positions

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DecisionIntelligence.NormalizationMethod.Percentile
member.summary: Percentile rank (0-100)
member.remarks: Ranks assets by percentile (0 = worst, 100 = best) Best for understanding relative position regardless of distribution

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DecisionIntelligence.MetricMetadata.ConfidenceHint
member.summary: Confidence level in the metric calculation (0.0 - 1.0)
member.remarks: 1.0 = High confidence (complete data, no anomalies detected) 0.5 - 0.99 = Medium confidence (minor data gaps or anomalies) Below 0.5 = Low confidence (significant data quality issues)

member.summary: Version of the calculation algorithm used
member.remarks: Format: "v{major}.{minor}" e.g., "v1.0" Enables tracking of calculation changes over time

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory
member.summary: Categories of deployment errors for structured error handling and reporting
member.remarks: Error categories help the frontend provide appropriate user feedback and enable better analytics for failure analysis. Each category maps to specific remediation strategies and user-facing messages.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.Unknown
member.summary: Error category is unknown or not yet categorized

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.NetworkError
member.summary: Network connectivity or blockchain RPC error
member.remarks: Includes timeouts, connection failures, and blockchain node unavailability. These errors are typically retryable after a delay.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.ValidationError
member.summary: Input validation error (invalid parameters, missing fields)
member.remarks: User must correct the request parameters. Not retryable without changes.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.ComplianceError
member.summary: Compliance or regulatory check failure
member.remarks: Includes KYC failures, whitelist violations, and regulatory constraint violations. Requires compliance remediation before retry.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.UserRejection
member.summary: User rejected the transaction or cancelled the operation
member.remarks: User-initiated cancellation. May be retried if user chooses to proceed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.InsufficientFunds
member.summary: Insufficient funds for transaction fees or gas
member.remarks: User needs to add funds to their account before retry.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.TransactionFailure
member.summary: Transaction failed on the blockchain (reverted, rejected by network)
member.remarks: Could be due to smart contract logic, network congestion, or invalid transaction. May be retryable after investigation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.ConfigurationError
member.summary: Configuration error (missing settings, invalid network configuration)
member.remarks: System administrator must fix configuration. User cannot remediate.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.RateLimitExceeded
member.summary: Rate limit or quota exceeded
member.remarks: User must wait or upgrade subscription tier. Retryable after cooldown.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentErrorCategory.InternalError
member.summary: Internal system error
member.remarks: Unexpected error requiring engineering investigation. May be retryable.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentError
member.summary: Detailed deployment error information
member.remarks: Provides structured error information that can be used for debugging, user feedback, and analytics. Includes both technical and user-friendly messages.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentError.Category
member.summary: Error category for classification and handling

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentError.ErrorCode
member.summary: Standardized error code from ErrorCodes class

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentError.TechnicalMessage
member.summary: Technical error message for logging and debugging

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentError.UserMessage
member.summary: User-friendly error message suitable for display in UI

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentError.IsRetryable
member.summary: Whether this error is retryable

member.summary: Suggested retry delay in seconds (if retryable)

member.summary: Additional context for debugging

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentError.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp when the error occurred (UTC)

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentSignOff.DeploymentSignOffProof
member.summary:
Structured deployment sign-off proof document.
This document is the backend's authoritative statement that a deployment lifecycle has completed with all required evidence fields present and all compliance criteria satisfied. It is intended to be cited in enterprise due-diligence, audit submissions, or product sign-off artefacts.
If is true, all required criteria passed and the deployment evidence is complete. If false, inspect for specific failures and use to guide remediation.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentSignOff.DeploymentSignOffProof.ProofId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this sign-off proof document.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentSignOff.DeploymentSignOffProof.DeploymentId
member.summary: Deployment contract ID this proof is for.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentSignOff.DeploymentSignOffProof.CorrelationId
member.summary: Correlation ID for distributed tracing.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentSignOff.DeploymentSignOffProof.IsReadyForSignOff
member.summary: Whether the deployment is ready for enterprise sign-off. true only when is and all required criteria passed.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a token deployment operation
member.remarks:
This enum defines the complete lifecycle of a token deployment from initial request through to completion or failure. Each status transition is tracked in the audit trail.
State Machine Flow: Queued → Submitted → Pending → Confirmed → Indexed → Completed ↓ ↓ ↓ ↓ ↓ Failed ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← (from any state) ↓ Queued (retry)
Queued → Cancelled (user-initiated)

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus.Queued
member.summary: Deployment request has been received and queued for processing

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus.Submitted
member.summary: Deployment transaction has been submitted to the blockchain network

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus.Pending
member.summary: Transaction is pending confirmation on the blockchain

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus.Confirmed
member.summary: Transaction has been confirmed by the blockchain (included in a block)

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus.Completed
member.summary: Deployment completed successfully with all post-deployment operations finished

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus.Failed
member.summary: Deployment failed at any stage of the process

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus.Indexed
member.summary: Transaction has been indexed by blockchain explorers and is fully propagated
member.remarks: This intermediate state between Confirmed and Completed indicates that the transaction is now visible in block explorers and can be queried by external systems. Useful for SLA tracking and reconciliation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Deployment was cancelled by the user before completion
member.remarks: User-initiated cancellation. Only valid from Queued state before submission.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeploymentStatusEntry
member.summary: Represents a deployment status entry tracking a single status transition
member.remarks: Each status change during token deployment creates a new entry, forming an append-only audit trail of the deployment lifecycle.

member.summary: Lifecycle stages of a deterministic token deployment orchestration.

member.summary: Initial state; inputs have been accepted but not yet validated.

member.summary: All inputs are structurally valid; ready to be enqueued.

member.summary: Enqueued for processing; awaiting capacity on the deployment chain.

member.summary: Actively being processed by the deployment engine.

member.summary: Deployment transaction confirmed on-chain.

member.summary: Orchestration completed successfully; all post-deployment checks passed.

member.summary: Terminal failure; manual intervention or re-initiation required.

member.summary: Operator or user cancelled the orchestration before completion.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.DeterministicOrchestration.OrchestrationStage.Retrying
member.summary: Transient failure encountered; automatic retry in progress.

member.summary: All compliance rules passed.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.EVM.EVMTokenDeploymentResponse
member.summary: Represents the response of an Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) token deployment operation.
member.remarks: This class encapsulates the details of a token deployment, including the transaction hash, the deployed contract address, the status of the deployment, and any error messages if the deployment failed. member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffExecutionMode
member.summary: Distinguishes how the KYC/AML check was executed: via a live external provider, a protected sandbox, or a local simulation. This field is used by product leadership and operators to determine whether sign-off evidence qualifies as release-grade.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffExecutionMode.LiveProvider
member.summary: The check was executed against a live, production-grade external provider using real API credentials. Evidence produced here is release-grade.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffExecutionMode.ProtectedSandbox
member.summary: The check was executed against a provider-operated sandbox or protected test environment using protected (non-production) API keys. Evidence is production-like but not live. Suitable for sign-off validation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffExecutionMode.Simulated
member.summary: The check was executed using an internal simulation / mock provider. Evidence is not release-grade. Suitable for unit and integration tests only.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome
member.summary: The normalized outcome of a KYC/AML sign-off check after provider processing.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.Pending
member.summary: The provider has not yet returned a result; awaiting callback or polling.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.Approved
member.summary: All required checks passed. Subject is approved for the next workflow step.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.Rejected
member.summary: One or more checks failed definitively (e.g., sanctions list match). Subject is rejected.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.NeedsManualReview
member.summary: The provider result requires manual analyst review before a final decision can be made.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.AdverseFindings
member.summary: Adverse findings were detected (e.g., PEP match, adverse media, watchlist hit). Remediation or further investigation is required.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.Blocked
member.summary: The check is blocked because of a pre-existing or dependent condition (e.g., unresolved prior adverse finding, incomplete remediation).

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.Stale
member.summary: Evidence was produced but has since expired. A new check must be initiated.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.ProviderUnavailable
member.summary: The external provider was unavailable or returned a transient error. The system has failed closed; no approval should be issued.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.Error
member.summary: A provider error or unrecognised response was received.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffOutcome.MalformedCallback
member.summary: The callback or polling data was malformed or contradictory.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffReadinessState
member.summary: Readiness state derived from all KYC/AML sign-off evidence for a subject. Used by approval-gating logic and the enterprise frontend.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffReadinessState.Ready
member.summary: All required checks have been completed, passed, and evidence is fresh. Subject is ready for approval.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffReadinessState.Blocked
member.summary: One or more checks are blocked due to adverse findings, provider failures, or unresolved remediation. Approval cannot proceed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffReadinessState.RequiresReview
member.summary: Evidence is present but requires manual review before a readiness decision.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffReadinessState.AwaitingProvider
member.summary: One or more checks are still awaiting a provider response.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffReadinessState.Stale
member.summary: Evidence was previously ready but has since expired. A new check must be initiated.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.KycAmlSignOff.KycAmlSignOffReadinessState.IncompleteEvidence
member.summary: Required evidence has not yet been submitted or no checks have been initiated.

member.summary: Combined KYC identity check and AML screening.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage
member.summary: Ordered stages in a live-provider KYC/AML verification journey. Stages advance linearly during successful execution and branch to terminal states (Degraded, Failed) when providers are unavailable or checks fail.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.NotStarted
member.summary: Journey record created; no provider calls made yet.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.KycInitiated
member.summary: KYC identity check has been dispatched to the provider.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.KycPending
member.summary: KYC check dispatched; awaiting provider callback or polling result.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.KycCompleted
member.summary: KYC identity check completed with a provider-confirmed outcome.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.AmlInitiated
member.summary: AML / sanctions screening has been dispatched to the provider.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.AmlPending
member.summary: AML screening dispatched; awaiting provider callback or polling result.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.AmlCompleted
member.summary: AML screening completed with a provider-confirmed outcome.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.UnderReview
member.summary: All automated checks completed; case is queued for analyst review. Human decision required before advancing.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.ApprovalReady
member.summary: All checks passed and evidence is not stale. Approval decision may be issued.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.Approved
member.summary: The verification journey ended with an approval decision.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.Rejected
member.summary: The verification journey ended with a rejection decision.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.SanctionsReview
member.summary: Subject matched a sanctions watchlist or adverse indicator. Sanctions-review procedure is active; journey cannot advance until resolved.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.RequiresAction
member.summary: One or more blockers require additional information or action before the journey can advance.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.Escalated
member.summary: Journey has been escalated for senior-analyst review.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.Degraded
member.summary: Provider reported a transient error, returned a malformed response, or required configuration is absent. The journey is in a degraded state and must not proceed to approval. Actionable diagnostics are included.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyStage.Failed
member.summary: Journey has entered a terminal failure state. Evidence cannot be used for approval gating. A new journey must be started after root-cause resolution.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyExecutionMode
member.summary: Execution mode resolved for the verification journey. Determines whether resulting evidence qualifies as release-grade.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyExecutionMode.LiveProvider
member.summary: The journey was executed against a live, production-grade external provider using real API credentials. Evidence is release-grade.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyExecutionMode.ProtectedSandbox
member.summary: The journey was executed against a provider-operated sandbox or protected test environment using protected (non-production) API keys. Evidence is production-like but not live. Suitable for sign-off validation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyExecutionMode.Simulated
member.summary: The journey was executed using an internal simulation / mock provider. Evidence is not release-grade. Use for unit and integration tests only.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.VerificationJourneyExecutionMode.Unknown
member.summary: Execution mode could not be resolved because the journey has not yet been initiated or the provider configuration is absent.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.JourneyBlockerSeverity
member.summary: Severity of a degraded-state or blocker condition observed during a journey.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.JourneyBlockerSeverity.Warning
member.summary: A recoverable warning; the journey may continue with operator action.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.JourneyBlockerSeverity.Blocking
member.summary: A blocking condition that prevents the journey from advancing until resolved.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.LiveProviderVerificationJourney.JourneyBlockerSeverity.Critical
member.summary: A critical failure. The journey must be abandoned and restarted after root-cause resolution.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle status of an ongoing monitoring task, covering the full range of operational states from healthy through suspended or restricted.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.Healthy
member.summary: No review is due; subject is in good standing.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.DueSoon
member.summary: A review is approaching — due within the configured lead-time window.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.Overdue
member.summary: The review due date has passed without a recorded review.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.InProgress
member.summary: A reassessment has been started and is actively in progress.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.AwaitingEvidence
member.summary: Waiting for required evidence before the reassessment can proceed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.Escalated
member.summary: Escalated to a senior reviewer or compliance officer.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.Blocked
member.summary: Blocked pending manual intervention or remediation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.Deferred
member.summary: Deferred to a future date with a recorded rationale.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.Resolved
member.summary: Review completed; outcome recorded — terminal for this task cycle.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.Suspended
member.summary: Subject suspended pending investigation — elevated-risk terminal state.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskStatus.Restricted
member.summary: Subject restricted from ongoing token activities — highest-risk terminal state.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason
member.summary: The reason why a monitoring task was created, allowing operators to distinguish between routine scheduled reviews and risk-triggered reassessments.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.PeriodicSchedule
member.summary: Regular periodic review based on the configured monitoring schedule.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.DocumentExpiry
member.summary: A KYC or identity document is expiring or has expired.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.SanctionsRefresh
member.summary: A sanctions list update requires the subject to be rescreened.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.AmlRescreening
member.summary: An AML provider has flagged a potential match requiring rescreening.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.RiskSignalElevated
member.summary: The subject's risk score has elevated and requires review.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.ManualAnalystRequest
member.summary: An analyst has manually requested a reassessment.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.EscalationFollowUp
member.summary: A follow-up task triggered by a prior escalation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.WebhookSignal
member.summary: An external webhook signal triggered the reassessment.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.ReassessmentReason.JurisdictionChange
member.summary: Regulatory jurisdiction rules have changed, requiring re-evaluation.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskSeverity
member.summary: Severity level assigned to a monitoring task, used for prioritisation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskSeverity.Low
member.summary: Routine review; no urgent risk indicators.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskSeverity.Medium
member.summary: Elevated attention warranted but not time-critical.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskSeverity.High
member.summary: Significant risk or regulatory concern requiring prompt action.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskSeverity.Critical
member.summary: Critical risk requiring immediate action; overrides normal queuing.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskResolution
member.summary: Resolution outcome when a monitoring task is closed, providing an auditable record of the final determination.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskResolution.Clear
member.summary: No issues found; subject remains in good standing.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTaskResolution.ActionTaken
member.summary: Issues identified and remediated before closure.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.OngoingMonitoring.MonitoringTask
member.summary: An ongoing compliance monitoring task representing a single review cycle for a subject linked to a compliance case. Monitoring tasks are the primary operational unit for compliance analysts — each task tracks a discrete review obligation with its own state machine, evidence requirements, due date, and auditable event trail.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationFailureCategory
member.summary: Classifies the reason for a pipeline failure to drive retry guidance and user messaging

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationFailureCategory.None
member.summary: No failure – pipeline succeeded

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationFailureCategory.ValidationFailure
member.summary: Request did not pass schema or invariant validation. Not retryable – caller must fix input.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationFailureCategory.PreconditionFailure
member.summary: A precondition (KYC, subscription, compliance) was not met. Retryable after user remediation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationFailureCategory.TransientInfrastructureFailure
member.summary: A transient infrastructure error occurred during execution (RPC timeout, IPFS unavailable). Retryable with exponential back-off.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationFailureCategory.PolicyFailure
member.summary: The operation could not be executed due to a permanent business rule violation. Not retryable without policy change.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationFailureCategory.PostCommitVerificationFailure
member.summary: Post-commit verification failed – the operation was submitted but the expected outcome was not confirmed on-chain or in storage. Retryable after operator investigation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationFailureCategory.TerminalExecutionFailure
member.summary: An unclassified terminal error occurred. Not retryable – requires operator investigation.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage
member.summary: Represents the stages of the policy-driven token workflow orchestration pipeline
member.remarks: The pipeline executes stages in order: Validate → CheckPreconditions → Execute → VerifyPostCommit → EmitTelemetry. Each stage emits a structured log marker so operators can trace exactly where a workflow is in the lifecycle and diagnose failures quickly.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage.NotStarted
member.summary: Pipeline not yet started

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage.Validate
member.summary: Stage 1: Validate request schema and invariant rules. Deterministic – same inputs produce the same validation outcome.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage.CheckPreconditions
member.summary: Stage 2: Check preconditions such as KYC status, subscription tier, and compliance policies. Guards execution from proceeding when platform requirements are unmet.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage.Execute
member.summary: Stage 3: Execute the core token workflow (deploy, mint, transfer, burn, etc.). Idempotency guarantees are enforced here using the idempotency key.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage.VerifyPostCommit
member.summary: Stage 4: Post-commit verification – confirm the executed operation reached the expected state on the underlying network or storage layer.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage.EmitTelemetry
member.summary: Stage 5: Emit standardized lifecycle telemetry events including correlation ID, stage markers, policy decisions, and audit summary.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage.Completed
member.summary: Pipeline completed successfully through all stages

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Orchestration.OrchestrationStage.Failed
member.summary: Pipeline terminated with a failure at one of the stages

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.ProtectedSignOffEnvironmentRequest.IncludeConfigCheck
member.summary: Whether to include required configuration guard validation in the environment check. Defaults to true. When true, the check validates that all required configuration keys (JWT secret, App mnemonic, etc.) are present and non-empty.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.ProtectedSignOffEnvironmentRequest.IncludeFixtureCheck
member.summary: Whether to include enterprise fixture validation in the environment check. Defaults to true.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.ProtectedSignOffEnvironmentRequest.IncludeObservabilityCheck
member.summary: Whether to include observability checks (logging and correlation ID infrastructure). Defaults to true.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.ProtectedSignOffEnvironmentRequest.IncludeComplianceWorkflowCheck
member.summary: Whether to include compliance workflow service health checks. When true, verifies that the KYC/AML sign-off evidence service and compliance case management service are available and wired up correctly. This check validates the backend compliance capabilities aligned with the enterprise onboarding workflow. Defaults to true.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.ProtectedSignOffEnvironmentResponse
member.summary:
Response from the protected sign-off environment readiness check.
When is , all required checks passed and the backend is prepared for a protected sign-off run. Any other status indicates that remediation is needed; consult and for specifics.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.EnterpriseSignOffLifecycleRequest.ProvisionFixturesIfAbsent

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.EnterpriseSignOffLifecycleResponse
member.summary:
Response from the enterprise sign-off lifecycle journey verification.
When is true, every required stage of the protected sign-off journey returned deterministic, contract-stable responses. This response can be cited as evidence that the backend is ready for a protected run.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.EnterpriseSignOffLifecycleResponse.VerificationId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this lifecycle verification response.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.EnterpriseSignOffLifecycleResponse.CorrelationId
member.summary: Correlation ID propagated from the request.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.EnterpriseSignOffLifecycleResponse.IsLifecycleVerified
member.summary: Whether all lifecycle stages were verified successfully. true means the backend is ready to support a protected sign-off run.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.EnterpriseSignOffLifecycleResponse.ReachedStage
member.summary: The last lifecycle stage that completed verification.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOff.EnterpriseSignOffLifecycleResponse.VerifiedStageCount
member.summary: Number of lifecycle stages verified.

member.summary: Number of lifecycle stages that failed.

member.summary: Ordered list of stage-by-stage verification results.

member.summary: ISO 8601 timestamp when the lifecycle verification was executed.

member.summary: The deployment ID used for sign-off validation.

member.summary:
Backend diagnostics report for a protected sign-off run.
Provides enough structured information for a product or operations team to distinguish configuration failures, authorization failures, contract failures, and lifecycle failures without exposing secrets.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffEvidenceFreshnessStatus
member.summary: Describes the freshness state of a protected sign-off evidence package relative to the current release head.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffEvidenceFreshnessStatus.Complete
member.summary: Evidence exists for the current head commit, all checks passed, and nothing has expired. The evidence is authoritative for release decisions.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffEvidenceFreshnessStatus.Partial
member.summary: Evidence exists but one or more evidence items are missing, incomplete, or pending. The evidence pack is not yet sufficient for release gating.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffEvidenceFreshnessStatus.Stale
member.summary: Evidence was captured for the current head but has since passed its freshness window. The evidence must be refreshed before it can gate release.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffEvidenceFreshnessStatus.Unavailable
member.summary: No evidence record exists for the current head. Sign-off has never been attempted or was never persisted for this head.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffEvidenceFreshnessStatus.HeadMismatch
member.summary: Evidence exists but was captured against a different head commit than the one currently being evaluated. The evidence may be valid for a prior head but cannot gate the current head.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.ApprovalWebhookOutcome
member.summary: Outcome of an approval webhook received for a protected sign-off flow.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.ApprovalWebhookOutcome.Approved
member.summary: Approval webhook delivered and processed successfully.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.ApprovalWebhookOutcome.Escalated
member.summary: Escalation webhook delivered — the case has been escalated to a higher reviewer before a final approval or denial decision.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.ApprovalWebhookOutcome.Denied
member.summary: Approval was denied; the release is blocked.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.ApprovalWebhookOutcome.Malformed
member.summary: Webhook payload arrived but was malformed, missing required fields, or could not be deserialized. The outcome is treated as unknown.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.ApprovalWebhookOutcome.TimedOut
member.summary: A delivery was attempted but the webhook never arrived within the expected window.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.ApprovalWebhookOutcome.DeliveryError
member.summary: The webhook delivery encountered an error that was not recoverable.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus
member.summary: Aggregated release-readiness status for the current head.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.Ready
member.summary: All required approvals received, evidence is complete and fresh, and no blockers are outstanding. The release can proceed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.Pending
member.summary: One or more required inputs are missing or incomplete. The system is actively awaiting evidence, approvals, or remediation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.Blocked
member.summary: A hard blocker prevents release. Evidence is missing, approval was denied, or a protected-environment check failed. Release is not permitted.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.Stale
member.summary: Evidence exists but is stale or was produced for a mismatched head. Re-execution of the sign-off workflow is required.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.Indeterminate
member.summary: The system cannot determine readiness because required backend services or evidence records are unavailable.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.BlockedMissingConfiguration
member.summary: Release is blocked because required protected-environment configuration or credentials are missing. The workflow infrastructure cannot verify sign-off readiness without valid configuration.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.BlockedProviderUnavailable
member.summary: Release is blocked because the compliance or KYC/AML provider is unavailable or unreachable. Evidence cannot be produced until the provider connection is restored.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.BlockedMissingEvidence
member.summary: Release is blocked because no evidence pack exists for the current head ref. A protected sign-off run must be executed to produce evidence.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.DegradedStaleEvidence
member.summary: Evidence pack exists but is stale (past its freshness window) or was produced for a different head. The workflow must be re-executed to produce fresh evidence before release can proceed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseReadinessStatus.NotReleaseEvidence
member.summary: An evidence pack was recorded but does not qualify as release evidence because protected configuration, live-provider credentials, or required proof artifacts were missing when it was captured. The workflow ran but produced a non-release-evidence outcome.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory
member.summary: Category of a release-readiness blocker, enabling the frontend to group and prioritise operator actions.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.Unspecified
member.summary: Sentinel value — a blocker must never carry this category. Its presence indicates that category assignment was omitted in the service layer.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.MissingApproval
member.summary: Required approval webhook has not been received.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.ApprovalDenied
member.summary: Approval was explicitly denied by a reviewer.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.MissingEvidence
member.summary: Evidence pack is absent for the current head.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.StaleEvidence
member.summary: Evidence pack is present but has expired or is beyond freshness window.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.HeadMismatch
member.summary: Evidence was produced for a different head than the current evaluation target.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.EnvironmentNotReady
member.summary: Protected-environment checks have not passed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.CaseNotApproved
member.summary: A compliance case required for sign-off is not in an approved state.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.UnresolvedEscalation
member.summary: An escalation is outstanding and must be resolved before approval can be finalised.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.MalformedWebhook
member.summary: The approval webhook arrived but contained malformed or missing data.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.SignOffReleaseBlockerCategory.Other
member.summary: A catch-all for blockers that do not fit other categories.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePack.IsReleaseEvidence
member.summary:
True when this evidence pack constitutes genuine release evidence — i.e. it was produced in a protected environment with live or sandbox provider credentials, all required proof artifacts are present, and no configuration blockers were encountered. Equivalent to .
This field provides an explicit is_release_evidence contract for frontend release-evidence center and product-owner tooling.

member.summary: The head ref that was evaluated.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProtectedSignOffEvidencePersistence.GetSignOffReleaseReadinessResponse.IsReleaseEvidence
member.summary:
True when the latest evidence pack for this head qualifies as genuine release evidence — produced in a protected environment with live or sandbox provider credentials, all required proof artifacts present, and no configuration blockers encountered.
This field is false when no evidence exists, when evidence is non-release-grade (simulated or unconfigured), or when any blocker prevents release.
Consumers MUST NOT infer readiness solely from this field; use and for the authoritative release decision.

member.summary: The most recent evidence pack for this head, if any.

member.summary: Ordered list of blockers preventing release. Empty when is Ready.

member.summary: Top-level operator guidance summarising next actions required before release. Null when status is Ready.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionMode
member.summary: Distinguishes how a compliance case decision was executed: via a live external provider, a protected sandbox, or a local simulation. Determines whether sign-off evidence qualifies as release-grade.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionMode.LiveProvider
member.summary: The decision was executed against a live, production-grade external provider using real API credentials. Evidence produced here is release-grade.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionMode.ProtectedSandbox
member.summary: The decision was executed against a provider-operated sandbox or protected test environment using protected (non-production) API keys. Evidence is production-like but not live. Suitable for sign-off validation.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionMode.Simulated
member.summary: The decision was executed using an internal simulation / mock provider. Evidence is not release-grade. Suitable for unit and integration tests only.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseDecisionKind
member.summary: The kind of compliance decision being executed through the provider-backed path.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseDecisionKind.Approve
member.summary: All compliance checks passed; case is being approved.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseDecisionKind.Reject
member.summary: One or more checks failed definitively; case is being rejected.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseDecisionKind.ReturnForInformation
member.summary: Reviewer requests additional information before proceeding.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseDecisionKind.SanctionsReview
member.summary: Case entered sanctions review — subject matched a watchlist or adverse indicator.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseDecisionKind.Escalate
member.summary: Case is being escalated for senior review.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionStatus
member.summary: Status of the compliance case execution against the provider-backed path.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionStatus.NotStarted
member.summary: No execution has been initiated for this case.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionStatus.InProgress
member.summary: Execution is in progress (async provider validation running).

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionStatus.Completed
member.summary: Execution completed successfully; case state was transitioned.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionStatus.Failed
member.summary: Execution failed; case state was NOT changed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionStatus.ConfigurationMissing
member.summary: Execution blocked because required provider configuration is missing. Actionable diagnostics are included in the response.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionStatus.InvalidState
member.summary: Execution blocked because the current case state does not permit the requested decision transition.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionStatus.InsufficientEvidence
member.summary: Execution blocked because mandatory provider-backed KYC/AML sign-off evidence is absent or stale.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics
member.summary: Structured diagnostics for a provider-backed compliance case execution attempt. All fields are populated regardless of success or failure to enable operator-friendly triage without log access.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics.IsConfigurationPresent
member.summary: True when all required provider configuration keys are present.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics.IsProviderAvailable
member.summary: True when the configured external provider responded to a health check.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics.IsKycSignOffComplete
member.summary: True when the KYC sign-off record for this case's subject is complete and not stale.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics.IsAmlSignOffComplete
member.summary: True when the AML sign-off record for this case's subject is complete and not stale.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics.ConfigurationFailures
member.summary: List of specific configuration keys that are absent or invalid.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics.ProviderFailures
member.summary: List of provider-reported failures (timeout, error codes, etc.).

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics.ActionableGuidance
member.summary: Plain-language guidance for operators to resolve blocking conditions. This field is always populated when or is false.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.ProviderBackedCompliance.ProviderBackedCaseExecutionDiagnostics.ExecutionMode
member.summary: The execution mode that was used or attempted during this execution.

member.summary: True when this evidence was produced by a live or protected-sandbox provider with all required checks passing. This is the release-gate qualification flag.

member.summary: Diagnostics at the time of execution.

member.summary: Ordered list of audit steps performed during execution.

member.summary: Correlation ID passed in the originating request.

member.summary: KYC/AML sign-off readiness state observed at time of execution. Populated when is LiveProvider or ProtectedSandbox.

member.summary: True when all included execution evidence was produced by a live or protected-sandbox provider. False if any evidence is simulated.

member.summary: True when the bundle qualifies as release-grade evidence for product-owner sign-off. Requires: IsProviderBackedEvidence=true AND at least one Completed execution present.

member.summary: Full operational detail, including remediation steps and internal reviewer notes.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Classification of error retryability for provider resilience
member.remarks:
This enum enables deterministic retry behavior across the platform. Frontend and backend can make consistent decisions about whether to retry, wait, or fail terminal based on this classification.
Business Value: Reduces user confusion and support burden by providing clear guidance on error remediation. Improves conversion by retrying transient failures automatically while failing fast on permanent errors.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicy.NotRetryable
member.summary: Error is not retryable - operation cannot succeed with same inputs
member.remarks: Examples: Validation errors, insufficient permissions, user rejections. User must change inputs or permissions before retry can succeed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicy.RetryableImmediate
member.summary: Error is retryable immediately without delay
member.remarks: Examples: Idempotent operations, state queries. Safe to retry immediately as operation has no side effects.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicy.RetryableWithDelay
member.summary: Error is retryable after a short delay (5-30 seconds)
member.remarks: Examples: Network timeouts, temporary RPC unavailability, IPFS delays. Provider may recover quickly. Exponential backoff recommended.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicy.RetryableWithCooldown
member.summary: Error is retryable after a longer delay (1-5 minutes)
member.remarks: Examples: Rate limiting, blockchain congestion, circuit breaker open. Requires cooling period before retry can succeed.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicy.RetryableAfterRemediation
member.summary: Error is retryable only after user remediation
member.remarks: Examples: Insufficient funds, KYC required, whitelist violation. User must take action (add funds, complete KYC) before retry.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicy.RetryableAfterConfiguration
member.summary: Error is retryable only after configuration change
member.remarks: Examples: Missing API keys, invalid network config, service endpoint errors. System administrator must fix configuration before retry can succeed.

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicyDecision
member.summary: Metadata about a retry policy decision
member.remarks: Provides context for why a particular retry policy was assigned, supporting debugging and operational visibility.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicyDecision.Policy
member.summary: The assigned retry policy

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicyDecision.ReasonCode
member.summary: Reason code for the policy assignment

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicyDecision.Explanation
member.summary: Human-readable explanation of the decision

member.summary: Suggested delay in seconds before retry (if applicable)

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicyDecision.MaxRetryAttempts
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts recommended

member.summary: Whether exponential backoff is recommended

member.summary: User-facing remediation guidance (if applicable)

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.RetryPolicyDecision.DecisionTimestamp
member.summary: Timestamp when decision was made (UTC)

member.name: T:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Subscription.SubscriptionTier
member.summary: Represents subscription tier levels for RWA token compliance operations
member.remarks: Different subscription tiers provide different limits on whitelist operations, enabling tiered pricing and usage-based billing for compliance features.

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Subscription.SubscriptionTier.Free
member.summary: Free tier - limited whitelist capacity for testing and small deployments
member.remarks: Limits: Up to 10 whitelisted addresses per asset

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Subscription.SubscriptionTier.Basic
member.summary: Basic tier - suitable for small to medium RWA token deployments
member.remarks: Limits: Up to 100 whitelisted addresses per asset

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Subscription.SubscriptionTier.Premium
member.summary: Premium tier - suitable for larger institutional deployments
member.remarks: Limits: Up to 1,000 whitelisted addresses per asset

member.name: F:BiatecTokensApi.Models.Subscription.SubscriptionTier.Enterprise
member.summary: Enterprise tier - unlimited capacity for large-scale deployments
member.remarks: Limits: Unlimited whitelisted addresses per asset

member.summary: Compliance metadata for token deployment requests (MICA/RWA)
member.remarks: This class captures compliance information during token deployment, including issuer details, jurisdiction, regulatory disclosures, and whitelist policies. Required for RWA tokens, optional for utility tokens.

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.TokenDeploymentComplianceMetadata.RegulatoryFramework
member.summary: Regulatory framework(s) the token complies with (e.g., "SEC Reg D", "MiFID II", "MICA")

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.TokenDeploymentComplianceMetadata.DisclosureUrl

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.TokenDeploymentComplianceMetadata.RequiresWhitelist
member.summary: Whether the token requires a whitelist for transfers

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.TokenDeploymentComplianceMetadata.RequiresAccreditedInvestors

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.TokenDeploymentComplianceMetadata.MaxHolders

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.TokenDeploymentComplianceMetadata.TransferRestrictions
member.summary: Restrictions on token transfers (if any)

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.TokenDeploymentComplianceMetadata.KycProvider
member.summary: Name of the KYC/AML provider used for verification

member.name: P:BiatecTokensApi.Models.TokenDeploymentComplianceMetadata.Notes
